name: Agent Core Fundamentals: Designing Persistent AI Agents on AWS
description:
**Free Live Masterclass – [Agent Core Fundamentals: Designing Persistent AI Agents on AWS](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/agent-core-fundamentals-designing-persistent-ai-agents-on-aws?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aws_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing)**

Building AI demos is easy. Building AI that works in real systems is not.
If you’ve used LLMs or Amazon Bedrock, you’ve likely seen the gap—AI that forgets context, struggles with multi-step workflows, and doesn’t integrate well into real applications.

In this session, you’ll see how AI is evolving from simple prompts to **Agent Core architectures on AWS**—where agents can remember, reason, and execute across workflows.

**Free to attend —** **[Join now](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/agent-core-fundamentals-designing-persistent-ai-agents-on-aws?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aws_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing)**[ ](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/agent-core-fundamentals-designing-persistent-ai-agents-on-aws?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aws_fy26_q2&utm_content=organic_listing)
April 22\, 2026 \| 12–2 PM EST

This is for the professionals who want to understand:

* Design persistent AI agents with memory
* Build multi-step reasoning workflows
* Integrate agents with APIs and enterprise systems
* Use Amazon Bedrock + AWS services for real-world AI
* Apply security and governance for production-ready AI

No hype. Just a clear view of how real AI systems are being built on AWS.

name: Mastering Microsoft AI Stack: Certify Your Teams in Copilot, Azure & M365
description:
**[Mastering Microsoft AI Stack: Certify Your Teams in Copilot, Azure & M365](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/mastering-microsoft-ai-stack-certify-your-team-in-copilot-azure-and-m365?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=n%2B_fy26_q2&utm_content=webinars&utm_term=at)**

Microsoft’s AI ecosystem spanning Copilot, Azure AI, and Microsoft 365 is rapidly transforming how organizations operate. However, many teams lack the certifications and structured training needed to manage, secure, and govern these technologies effectively.

Join this 60-minute technical briefing to gain a clear, practical roadmap for certifying your teams across the Microsoft AI stack and aligning skills with real-world implementation needs.
**Date: Thu, Apr 23, 2026**
**Time: 10:00 AM EST \| 07:30 PM IST \| 07:00 AM PST**
**What You’ll Learn**

* Key components of the Microsoft AI ecosystem
* Role-based certification paths across fundamentals, admin, and AI specializations
* How to align certifications with enterprise AI deployments
* Ways to scale training using the N+ learning platform

**[Register now to equip your teams with the skills needed to successfully deploy and manage Microsoft AI solutions.](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/mastering-microsoft-ai-stack-certify-your-team-in-copilot-azure-and-m365?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=n%2B_fy26_q2&utm_content=webinars&utm_term=at)**

name: Generative AI for Business: Real Use Cases Beyond Chatbots
description:
Join our FREE webinar, **["Generative AI for Business: Real Use Cases Beyond Chatbots](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/generative-ai-for-business-real-use-cases-beyond-chatbots?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aicerts_fy26_q2&utm_content=webinars&utm_term=nv)",** and discover how organizations are using AI to drive real business impact beyond basic automation. As AI rapidly evolves, businesses that leverage practical, high-value use cases will gain a significant competitive edge.

**Schedule:**
Date: Thu, Apr 23, 2026
Time: 12 PM – 01:00 PM EST
**REGISTER NOW** - **[CLICK HERE TO REGISTER](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/generative-ai-for-business-real-use-cases-beyond-chatbots?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aicerts_fy26_q2&utm_content=webinars&utm_term=nv)**

This session dives into how generative AI is transforming business operations across functions—from marketing and sales to development and decision-making. Learn how to move beyond chatbots and unlock AI’s full potential with real-world applications and actionable insights.

**What You Will Learn:**

* How businesses are using generative AI beyond chatbots
* Practical use cases across different industries and functions
* Tools, tips, and live demos to implement AI effectively
* Strategies to integrate AI into your workflows for maximum impact

Don’t miss this opportunity to explore how generative AI can reshape the way your business operates and innovates.

name: Introduction to Microsoft 365 Copilot
description:
Wondering how to actually get started with Microsoft 365 Copilot and drive real adoption across your organization? This LIVE webinar answers common questions around what Copilot is, how it works, and how teams can begin using AI effectively in their daily workflows.

**[Click Here to register for FREE](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/mst365-copilot-adoption-webinar?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)**
**DATE:** April 27, 2026
**TIME:** 12 PM- 1PM EST
Explore practical use cases, key features, and simple strategies to help you understand where Copilot adds value from automating tasks to improving productivity across apps like Word, Excel, Outlook, and Teams.

**What you will learn:**

* What Copilot is (and isn’t): where it helps, where humans stay responsible
* **Security & trust basics:** data boundaries, permissions matter, “don’t paste secrets” rules
* **Free vs. paid:** what’s available in each and what value changes with paid seats
* “Art of the Possible” demos: 3–5 quick use cases across common roles
* Adoption path: what users do next (Phase 1 workshop or Phase 2 N+ path)

**Seats are limited - [Register Today](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/mst365-copilot-adoption-webinar?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)!**
